title: 3. **Crypto Arbitrage Bot**
summary:
What it is: Develop and deploy an arbitrage bot that exploits price differences between crypto assets on various exchanges (e.g., Binance, Kraken). Initially paper-trade to refine strategies.
Revenue model: Profit from buying low on one exchange and selling high on another, minus transaction fees.
Time to first dollar: 2-4 weeks, considering development, testing, and initial deployment phases.
First action: Conduct market research to identify the most volatile crypto pairs with sufficient liquid
